# TransportationReporting

Parchi to Billing — App Proposal for digitalized transportation reporting.

## Live Page

**[View Proposal →](https://adityaahir3105.github.io/TransportationReporting/)**

## What is This?

A proposal to replace the manual paper-based transportation reporting system (register books, Excel data entry, paper Hajri cards) with a single app. Field-level parchi stays the same — only office work gets digitalized.

**Old:** 14 steps, 5+ people, triple data entry  
**New:** 4 steps, 3 people, single app entry → everything auto-generated
